title: Inside the Worlds of Star Wars Trilogy
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Inside-the-worlds-of-star-wars.jpg]] |title=''Inside the Worlds of
Star Wars Trilogy'' |author=[[James Luceno]] |cover artist= |illustrator=[[Richard Chasemore]] and [[Hans Jenssen]] and [[John Mullaney]]{{InsiderCite|234|Deep Cuts: The Incredible Cross-Sections of John R. Mullaney}} |editor= |publisher=[[Dorling Kindersley]] |release date=*[[August 5]], [[2004]] {{C|UK}}{{DK|subdomain=uk|url=nf/Book/BookDisplay/0,,11_1405305398,00.html|text=Inside the Worlds of Star Wars Trilogy|nolive=1}} *[[August 16]], 2004 {{C|UK}}{{DK|subdomain=us|url=nf/Book/BookDisplay/0,,11_0756603072,00.html|text=Inside the Worlds of Star Wars|nolive=1}} |type=Hardcover |pages= |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=0756603072 |series=''[[Inside the Worlds of]]'' |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Inside the Worlds of Star Wars Trilogy''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] reference book that covers the locations of the [[original trilogy]]. It was written by [[James Luceno]] and illustrated by [[Hans Jenssen]] and [[Richard Chasemore]] and [[John Mullaney]] with [[Curtis Saxton]] as consultant and was published by [[Dorling Kindersley|DK]] on [[August 5]], [[2004]]. ==Contents== *[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] *[[Lars homestead/Legends|Lars Homestead]] *[[Tosche Station/Legends|Tosche Station]] / [[Ben Kenobi's home/Legends|Ben's House]] *[[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] *[[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|The Cantina]] *[[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|The Death Star]] *[[Great Temple/Legends|The Great Temple]] *[[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] *[[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] *[[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] *[[Yoda's Hut/Legends|Yoda's House]] *[[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] *Processing Vane *[[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] *Jabba's Throne Room *[[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] *[[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Ewok Village]] *[[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] *[[Emperor's Throne Room/Legends|Emperor's Lair]] *[[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] Command Tower ==Continuity== ''Inside the Worlds of Star Wars Trilogy'' presented a new location for [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]], which had historically been placed at the southwestern edge of the [[Western Dune Sea/Legends|Western Dune Sea]]—a location far to the southwest of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]], and the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]]. ''Inside the Worlds'' moved the Palace and the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]] to the southwestern edge of the [[Northern Dune Sea/Legends|Northern Dune Sea]] instead, placing it at the northeastern edge of the [[Great Mesra Plateau/Legends|Great Mesra Plateau]] and significantly closer to other cities. However, a notation on the map of the Palace mistakenly states that it leads to the Western Dune Sea and the Pit of Carkoon. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Inside the Worlds of Star Wars Trilogy}} {{App |characters= *[[8D8/Legends|8D8]] *[[Ackmena/Legends|Ackmena]] *[[Cane Adiss/Legends|Cane Adiss]] *[[Ak-rev/Legends|Ak-rev]] {{Po}} *[[Alkhara/Legends|Alkhara]] *[[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]] *[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] *[[Avarik]] *[[Ponda Baba/Legends|Ponda Baba]] *[[Barich]] *[[Beedo/Legends|Beedo]] {{Po}} *[[Nizuc Bek/Legends|Nizuc Bek]] *[[Doda Bodonawieedo/Legends|Doda Bodonawieedo]] *[[Danz Borin/Legends|Danz Borin]] {{Po}} *[[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] *[[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]] *[[Buboicullaar/Legends|Buboicullaar]] {{Po}} *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] *[[Trey Callum/Legends|Trey Callum]] *[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] *[[Lirin Car'n/Legends|Lirin Car'n]] {{Po}} *[[Chalmun/Legends|Chalmun]] *[[Nalan Cheel/Legends|Nalan Cheel]] *[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] *[[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]] *[[Salacious B.
